name: redis_database_create_new
description: Create a new Upstash redis database.

primary_region.description: Primary Region of the Global Database.

read_regions.description: Array of read regions of the db

name: redis_database_delete
description: Delete an Upstash redis database.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to delete.

name: redis_database_list_databases
description: List all Upstash redis databases. Only their names and ids.

name: redis_database_get_details
description: Get further details of a specific Upstash redis database.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to get details for.

name: redis_database_update_regions
description: Update the read regions of an Upstash redis database.

read_regions.description: Array of the new read regions of the database.

name: redis_database_reset_password
description: Reset the password of an Upstash redis database.

name: redis_database_get_statistics
description: Get comprehensive usage statistics of an Upstash redis database.

stat_type.description: The type of sampled stat to get (defaults to 'throughput')

name: redis_database_manage_backup
description: Create, delete, or restore backups for a specific Upstash redis database.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to manage backups for.

operation.description: The backup operation to perform: create, delete, or restore.

backup_name.description: Name for the backup (required for create operation).

backup_id.description: ID of the backup (required for delete and restore operations).

name: redis_database_list_backups
description: List all backups of a specific Upstash redis database.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to list backups for.

name: redis_database_set_daily_backup
description: Enable or disable daily backups for a specific Upstash redis database.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to enable or disable daily backups for.

enable.description: Whether to enable or disable daily backups.

name: redis_database_run_redis_commands
description: Run one or more Redis commands on a specific Upstash redis database.

database_id.description: The ID of the database to run commands on.

database_rest_url.description: The REST URL of the database.

database_rest_token.description: The REST token of the database.

name: qstash_get_user_token
description: Get the QSTASH_TOKEN and QSTASH_URL of the current user.

name: qstash_publish_message
description: Publish a message to a destination URL using QStash.

destination.description: The destination URL to send the message to.

body.description: Request body (JSON string or plain text)

retries.description: Number of retries on failure, default is 3

extraHeaders.description: Extra headers to add to the request

name: qstash_logs_list
description: List QStash logs with optional filtering.

fromDate.description: Filter logs from date (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

toDate.description: Filter logs to date (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

name: qstash_logs_get
description: Get details of a single QStash log item by message ID.

messageId.description: The message ID to get details for

name: qstash_dlq_list
description: List messages in the QStash Dead Letter Queue (DLQ).

messageId.description: Filter DLQ messages by message ID

fromDate.description: Filter from date (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

toDate.description: Filter to date (Unix timestamp in milliseconds)

name: qstash_dlq_get
description: Get details of a single DLQ message by DLQ ID.

dlqId.description: The DLQ ID of the message to retrieve

name: qstash_schedules_list
description: List all QStash schedules.

name: qstash_schedules_manage
description: Create, update, pause, resume, or delete QStash schedules.

scheduleId.description: Schedule ID (required for update, pause, resume, delete operations)

destination.description: Destination URL or topic name (required for create/update)

name: workflow_logs_list
description: List Upstash Workflow logs with optional filtering.

workflowRunId.description: Filter by specific workflow run ID

count.description: Number of workflow runs to return

name: workflow_logs_get
description: Get details of a single workflow run by workflow run ID.

workflowRunId.description: The workflow run ID to get details for

name: workflow_dlq_list
description: List failed workflow runs in the Dead Letter Queue (DLQ).

count.description: Number of DLQ messages to return

name: workflow_dlq_get
description: Get details of a single failed workflow run from the DLQ.

dlqId.description: The DLQ ID of the failed workflow run to retrieve

name: workflow_dlq_manage
description: Delete, restart, or resume failed workflow runs in the DLQ.

dlqId.description: The DLQ ID of the failed workflow run

name: util_timestamps_to_date
description: Use this tool to convert a timestamp to a human-readable date

name: util_dates_to_timestamps
description: Use this tool to convert an array of ISO 8601 dates to an array of timestamps
